title: Human Gates, Permissions, and Reversible Autonomy · Failure Case: User Steering
summary: Set human review points for a consequential operations agent. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops user steering increment in a risk-tiered approval matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Apply user corrections immediately without silently broadening the task.
Give each loop and tool only the capabilities and data required for its current goal.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
